headline: Should Extra Space Storage Stock Be in Your Portfolio Pre-Q1 Earnings?
summary: EXR is set to report Q1 2026 results on April 28, with revenues and FFO per share anticipated to rise year over year.

headline: Is BXP Stock a Smart Buy Before Q1 Earnings Release?

headline: BXP Releases 2025 Sustainability & Impact Report
summary: BOSTON, April 22, 2026--BXP (NYSE: BXP), the largest publicly traded developer, owner, and manager of premier workplaces in the United States, today announced the release of BXP’s 2025 Sustainability & Impact Report.
